item.title: US Treasury, OCC, FDIC and Federal Reserve miss July 18 GENIUS Act deadline for final stablecoin implementing rules
EU MiCA transition period ended July 1, cutting off roughly 80% of European crypto firms lacking full CASP licenses
Stripe, Coinbase, BlackRock, Mastercard and Visa join 140-company consortium to launch Open USD fee-free stablecoin
SEC prepares to propose rule in July that would exempt certain crypto activities from US securities regulation
Tether's USDT faces 2-year compliance window under GENIUS Act before required removal from US platforms
House Financial Services Committee holds CLARITY Act market structure field hearing in New York on July 17
JPMorgan issues $50M in commercial paper for Galaxy Digital on Solana, with Coinbase and Franklin Templeton as buyers
US spot ether ETFs attract $96M over three days, with BlackRock's fund receiving nearly all net inflows
Bitcoin ETFs record second consecutive week of net inflows totaling $75.7M
Australia's Travel Rule for crypto exchanges takes effect July 1, requiring identity data on all withdrawal transfers
Ostium perpetuals exchange loses $18M after attacker submits future-dated price data to manipulate oracle payouts
Ethical hackers disclose patched Aptos blockchain flaw that could have put $70B in digital assets at systemic risk
Kraken obtains MiCA license through Central Bank of Ireland to maintain regulated EU operations
